Index.title: The Master Network For Your Company
Index.hero_desc: We are a specialist company in comprehensive solutions for the B2B corporate ecosystem, strategic alliances, 360° solution focus; we empower your company with business intelligence and efficient, dynamic, and direct supply, connecting opportunities and being your vertical B2B structural ally.
Index.solutions_desc: We develop digital ecosystems and operational plans adapted to accelerate your industrial growth.
Index.resources_desc: Tools, regulatory libraries, and centralized documentation available to the entire B2B network.
Index.sectors_desc: Specialized analytical and operational coverage in the productive pillars of the continent.
Index.identity_desc: We were born from the need to modernize heavy supply chains. We are more than a search engine; we are the technological backbone of corporate procurement in Latin America.
Index.catalog_empty: The master catalog is currently being updated.

Login.welcome_desc: Master Control Center - Industrial Identity and Digital Catalog Management.
Login.error_invalid: Invalid credentials. Please verify your email and password.
Login.seo_desc: Access your control panel at B2B Empresas and manage your industrial catalog efficiently.

Socios.subtitle: Strategic Sourcing and High-Performance Industrial Supply Management.
Socios.quote: End-to-end B2B solutions: Consulting, Projects and Industrial Supply.
Socios.art_p1: Being a strategic partner of B2B Empresas means inserting yourself directly into the largest intelligent inter-company network in the region. We do not operate on assumptions; we transform industrial complexity into strategic efficiency to jointly enhance production objectives.
Socios.art_h2: The Master Catalog (CMb2b) at Your Service
Socios.art_p2: Collaborating with us as verified suppliers and logistics leaders means your infrastructure will interact dynamically with our system. Empowering the industry through business intelligence and strategic supply to scale borders without doubling the IT maintenance load.
Socios.cta_desc: Become a Vertical Structural Ally in our Value Chain and access corporate markets with full traceability.
Socios.seo_desc: Join B2B Empresas' Master Network as a strategic partner and enhance your industrial reach in Latin America.

Inversores.subtitle: B2B Empresas: Business Architects, Allies in Your Value Chain.
Inversores.quote: Project Management and Implementation of Industrial Solutions, Transforming Investment into Strategic Capitalization.
Inversores.art_h1: The Value of the B2B Ecosystem
Inversores.art_p1: Our Multi-Tenant SaaS platform unifies a deeply fragmented sector. We capture thousands of industrial transactions and inject pure efficiency into the Latin American supply system through global standardization.
Inversores.art_p2: B2B Empresas accompanies the evolution of high-performance corporate businesses. We radically optimize the way manufacturers, contractors, and importers congregate through Business Intelligence. Your investment is part of an interconnected fabric that will redefine the structural productive economy.
Inversores.cta_desc: We maximize profitability through diagnosis and organizational disruption in high-demand markets.
Inversores.audit_status: Check our industrial impact indicators for this year.
Inversores.seo_desc: Discover investment opportunities in B2B Empresas, the platform transforming industrial procurement in LATAM.

Marketing.subtitle: Strategic Advertising and Brand Positioning in the B2B Segment.
Marketing.quote: We don't just sell products; we position your installed capacity before the region's most relevant decision-makers.
Marketing.art_p1: Modern B2B marketing is not about volume, but relevance. Through our Business Intelligence engine, we connect your solutions with the specific needs of companies consulting the B2B Master Catalog.
Marketing.art_p2: Forget about spam. Our strategy is based on Industrial Inbound: attracting buyers through technical content, optimized product sheets, and validation of strategic supplies that generate immediate trust.
Marketing.art_p3: Being part of B2B Empresas gives you a permanent showcase before a network of Strategic Partners and Investors. We power your brand through segmented visibility by sector, ensuring your message reaches the right business architecture.
Marketing.cta_desc: We empower industry through business intelligence and high-impact strategic positioning.
Marketing.audit_status: Accelerate your penetration into international B2B markets.
Marketing.seo_desc: Position your industrial brand before the sector's most relevant decision-makers through our 360° marketing solutions.

Quality.subtitle: We transform industrial complexity into strategic efficiency with absolute traceability.
Quality.quote: B2B Strategy & Business Consulting: We maximize profitability through the diagnosis and strengthening of the business structure.
Quality.art_p1: We are a Specialist Company in comprehensive solutions for the corporate ecosystem. We focus on forging strategic alliances under a 360° solution focus. Quality is not only in the final product but in every stage of the industrial supply and business engineering chain we design.
Quality.art_p2: To ensure our customers' uninterrupted operation, we have integrated the B2B Master Catalog (CMb2b) as a cornerstone, designed to mitigate risks, eradicate duplicate information in the market, and implement strict Technical and Industrial Data Sheet validations before any supply reaches the transactional environment.
Quality.art_p3: We drive Business Development and Consolidation: accompanying the evolution of family businesses and startups towards high-performance corporate models. Because your growth is the faithful reflection of our methodological excellence.
Quality.cta_desc: Specialists in supply chain integration with constant monitoring of quality KPIs.
Quality.audit_status: Certifications and standards of industrial excellence.
Quality.seo_desc: At B2B Empresas, quality is not an option; it is our fundamental standard in every process of the industrial network.

Security.subtitle: Risk Management, Cybersecurity and Digital Asset Protection in the B2B Ecosystem.
Security.quote: The integrity of your information is our most valuable asset. We implement cutting-edge security protocols to shield every transaction.
Security.art_p1: Our SaaS infrastructure operates under multi-layer security standards. From AES-256 encryption at rest to TLS 1.3 communications, we ensure that the exchange of Technical Sheets, Contracts, and Billing Data remains strictly confidential.
Security.art_p2: B2B Empresas implements a robust Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) system. Every interaction within the Master Catalog is duly authenticated and authorized, allowing only designated personnel visibility over sensitive information in your supply chain.
Security.art_p3: We don't wait for an event to happen; we prevent it. We have Intrusion Detection Systems (IDS) and immutable audit logs that allow us to track every movement within the platform, ensuring full traceability required by current industrial regulations.
Security.cta_desc: Our cybersecurity approach protects industrial transactions with full encryption.
Security.seo_desc: We protect the integrity of your data and transactions with the highest standards of industrial cybersecurity.

Sostenibilidad.subtitle: Advisory and Consulting on Sustainability and Positive Impact Corporate Structuring.
Sostenibilidad.quote: Project Management and Business Engineering: We design and execute roadmaps oriented towards sustainable growth and market expansion.
Sostenibilidad.art_h1: The Future of the B2B Corporate Ecosystem
Sostenibilidad.art_p1: Modern industry demands more than efficiency; it demands responsibility, environmental regulations, and ethical practices. We evaluate and prioritize suppliers in our CMb2b network that adopt green methodologies alongside energy saving and carbon emission reduction.
Sostenibilidad.art_p2: We accompany the evolution of family businesses and startups towards high-performance corporate models, ensuring their transition integrates key pillars of environmental protection and waste control. Optimizing the industrial supply chain also means optimizing its ecological footprint.
Sostenibilidad.cta_desc: We build industrial networks that balance profitability with environmental responsibility.
Sostenibilidad.audit_status: Our commitment to the future of the industry.
Sostenibilidad.seo_desc: Learn how B2B Empresas integrates sustainability into the industrial supply chain for a lasting positive impact.

Privacy.subtitle: Transparency, Consent and Personal Data Protection in the B2B Ecosystem.
Privacy.quote: Your privacy is a fundamental right that we integrate into the core of our platform design (Privacy by Design).
Privacy.art_p1: At B2B Empresas, we understand that handling corporate and personal data requires the highest level of responsibility. We do not sell or transfer your information to third parties. Our collection is strictly limited to what is necessary to facilitate Business Intelligence and Strategic Vision for your account.
Privacy.art_p2: You maintain full control over your digital assets at all times. You can access, rectify, cancel or oppose the processing of your data through our profile settings console. We empower users to decide what information is visible within the B2B Master Catalog.
Privacy.art_p3: We implement technical and organizational measures to prevent unauthorized access or alteration of your information. Data storage complies with the strictest international regulations (GDPR), ensuring a trusted environment for your strategic supply.
Privacy.cta_desc: Your corporate information is protected with the highest encryption standards.
Privacy.audit_status: Your privacy is our corporate priority.
Privacy.seo_desc: Total transparency on data handling within the B2B Empresas ecosystem, complying with global regulations.

Confianza.subtitle: Business Architects, Allies in Your Value Chain.
Confianza.quote: We are a Specialist Company in Business, Business Intelligence and Strategic Vision.
Confianza.art_p1: Trust is not demanded, it is built. Through Wholesale Distribution and Industrial Supplier Management, we generate a closed, evaluated and structured ecosystem where every transaction reflects a long-term commercial commitment.
Confianza.art_p2: We foster a hyper-connected ground, where we connect opportunities acting as your Vertical B2B Structural Ally. Our focus rests on always showing origin, regulations, availability (SKU-CUIM) and real, audited information about manufacturers and distributors.
Confianza.art_p3: Every Registered Supplier goes through a thorough Profile Setup process. Becoming a member of B2B Empresas means adhering to global standards of operational and financial transparency. We ensure that the buying user receives 360° reliable information.
Confianza.cta_desc: We operate with total traceability, ensuring reliable commercial relationships across the entire B2B network.
Confianza.audit_status: Building solid and transparent industrial relationships.
Confianza.seo_desc: Trust is the engine of our network; learn about the mechanisms ensuring a safe and verified commercial environment.

Terms.subtitle: B2B Empresas Infrastructure Use Regulations and Agreements.
Terms.quote: B2B Empresas: Transparency and Legal Security in the Industrial Ecosystem.
Terms.art_p1: By accessing and using b2bempresas.com, you agree to comply with these terms. Our platform facilitates the creation of industrial digital catalogs for legally constituted companies.
Terms.art_p2: Each 'Tenant' (vendor) is solely responsible for the accuracy of prices, technical sheets, and availability of products shown in their digital catalog.
Terms.art_p3: The software architecture, the 'Industrial Premium' design, and the WhatsApp alert system are the intellectual property of b2bempresas.com.
Terms.cta_desc: Our legal framework ensures fair competition and full traceability of business operations.
Terms.seo_desc: Consult the terms of use and legal conditions of the B2B Empresas platform.
